scripts.render:hero:gif: remotion render src/index.ts READMEHero ../../assets/.tmp-readme-hero.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 && ffmpeg -y -i ../../assets/.tmp-readme-hero.mp4 -vf "fps=12,scale=1200:-1:flags=lanczos,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen[p];[s1][p]paletteuse=dither=bayer:bayer_scale=5" ../../assets/readme-hero.gif && rm -f ../../assets/.tmp-readme-hero.mp4
scripts.render:all: pnpm run render:hero:gif && pnpm run render:hero:poster && pnpm run render:launch && pnpm run render:launch:thumb && pnpm run render:feature
